```{=html}
<style>
.paper-list-updated {
  color: #555;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.paper-card {
  border-top: 1px solid #d8dee6;
  padding: 1rem 0 1.1rem 0;
  margin: 0;
}

.paper-card:last-child {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #d8dee6;
}

.paper-date {
  color: #666;
  font-size: 0.9em;
  margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
}

.paper-title {
  font-size: 1.05em;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.paper-authors {
  color: #333;
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
}

.paper-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin-top: 0.45rem;
}

.paper-badge,
.paper-category {
  border: 1px solid #d4dce5;
  border-radius: 4px;
  color: #1a6aab;
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.82em;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: 0.28rem 0.42rem;
}

.paper-category {
  color: #555;
}
</style>
```

<p class="paper-list-updated"><em>Last updated May 06, 2026. See more <a href="contents/all-papers.qmd">here</a>.</em></p>

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">May 04, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03206v1">The maximum-entropy median-martingale</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Rikhav Shah, Vilas Winstein</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03206v1">arXiv:2605.03206v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2605.03206v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Apr 30, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27619v1">Rising GUE Eigenvalue Process from a Fixed Level</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Zoe Himwich</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27619v1">arXiv:2604.27619v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.27619v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Mar 17, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.17177v1">Discrete RG flow of a hierarchical singular SPDE</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Leonard Ferdinand, Simon Gabriel</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.17177v1">arXiv:2603.17177v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.17177v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Mar 17, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18053v1">Auditing the Auditors: Does Community-based Moderation Get It Right?</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Yeganeh Alimohammadi, Karissa Huang, Christian Borgs, Jennifer Chayes</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18053v1">arXiv:2603.18053v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.18053v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">cs.SI, cs.CY, econ.GN</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 26, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.22509v1">Fluctuations in the weakly coupled 4D Anderson Hamiltonian</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Simon Gabriel, Tommaso Rosati</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.22509v1">arXiv:2602.22509v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.22509v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR, math.AP</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 18, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.16797v1">Fast, High-Accuracy, Randomized Nullspace Computations for Tall Matrices</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Ethan N. Epperly, Taejun Park, Yuji Nakatsukasa</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.16797v1">arXiv:2602.16797v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.16797v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.NA</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 17, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.15822v1">Finite Free Information Inequalities</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Jorge Garza-Vargas, Nikhil Srivastava, Zachary Stier</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.15822v1">arXiv:2602.15822v1</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.15822v1">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.PR, math.CA, math.CO</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 05, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.05394v2">Linear Systems and Eigenvalue Problems: Open Questions from a Simons Workshop</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Noah Amsel, Yves Baumann, Paul Beckman, Peter Bürgisser, Chris Camaño, Tyler Chen, Edmond Chow, Anil Damle et al.</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.05394v2">arXiv:2602.05394v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.05394v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">math.NA, cs.DS</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 05, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.05192v2">First Proof</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Mohammed Abouzaid, Andrew J. Blumberg, Martin Hairer, Joe Kileel, Tamara G. Kolda, Paul D. Nelson, Daniel Spielman, Nikhil Srivastava et al.</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.05192v2">arXiv:2602.05192v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.05192v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">cs.AI, math.AG, math.CO</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.paper-card}
<div class="paper-date">Feb 04, 2026</div>
<div class="paper-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.04842v2">The matrix-vector complexity of $Ax=b$</a></div>
<div class="paper-authors">Michał Dereziński, Ethan N. Epperly, Raphael A. Meyer</div>
<div class="paper-links">
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.04842v2">arXiv:2602.04842v2</a>
<a class="paper-badge" href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.04842v2">PDF</a>
<span class="paper-category">cs.DS, math.NA, math.OC</span>
</div>
:::
